diagram_title: fix-empty-response-rca C4 Component View (Phase 1: L1 + L2)

systems.name: opencode
systems.description: Bundle that includes the codex provider package and the runloop. This spec patches both.

containers.name: codex provider package (packages/opencode-codex-provider)
containers.description: DD-2 patches transport-ws.ts throw sites + adds wsErrorReason field

containers.name: opencode runtime (packages/opencode)
containers.description: DD-1 patches session/prompt.ts compaction trigger; DD-3 patches session/processor.ts rotation guard

containers.name: filesystem state
containers.description: <state>/codex/empty-turns.jsonl (existing) gets new wsErrorReason field; <state>/codex/cache-equilibrium.jsonl (NEW) gets L1 detection events

components.name: transport-ws.ts wsRequest + getSnapshot
components.description: DD-2: ws.onerror frameCount=0 + ws.onclose frameCount=0 + first_frame_timeout no longer call endWithError; instead set wsObs.wsErrorReason and call endStream(). DD-5: TransportSnapshot gains wsErrorReason field.

components.name: empty-turn-classifier.ts
components.description: Already has ws_no_frames predicate; no enum change. Reads new wsErrorReason from snapshot, threads it into log payload via buildClassificationPayload (no behavioral change).

components.name: empty-turn-log.ts
components.description: Receives wsErrorReason in the payload; appends to JSONL transparently. No code change required (data-schema.json change is additive).

components.name: session/prompt.ts derivePredictedCacheMiss (NEW helper)
components.description: DD-1: replaces the inline `continuationInvalidatedAt ? "miss" : "unknown"` ternary with a stateful helper that returns hit/miss/unknown based on lastFinished.tokens.cache.read

components.name: session/prompt.ts cache-equilibrium-detector (NEW)
components.description: Tracks the last N cache.read values per session; emits CacheEquilibriumDetectionEvent (data-schema.json) when N consecutive values are identical. JSONL channel <state>/codex/cache-equilibrium.jsonl + Bus channel codex.cacheEquilibrium.

components.name: session/processor.ts isModelTemporaryError (PATCHED)
components.description: DD-3: reads opaque providerMetadata.openai.emptyTurnClassification.causeFamily; if present, returns false (this is a classified empty turn, not a rotation-worthy error). Boundary discipline: no codex-provider type imports.

components.name: session/processor.ts catch block (caller of isModelTemporaryError)
components.description: Already collects the most recent assistant message; threads its providerMetadata into the isModelTemporaryError call. Minimal change.

components.name: empty-turns.jsonl
components.description: Existing file; gains optional wsErrorReason field on entries where ws-layer originated the empty turn

components.name: cache-equilibrium.jsonl (NEW)
components.description: New JSONL channel for L1 detection events. Operator query M8 reads from this. Append-only; same lifecycle conventions as empty-turns.jsonl.

relationships.description: JSONL line written with new field
cache-equilibrium-detector observes the values that derivePredictedCacheMiss reads, emits when locked
(indirect) classifier output flows through finish part to runloop, where C6 reads it
